text:
Gyan Vault Project Report (Updated)
CHAPTER 1
1.1 INTRODUCTION
With the exponential growth of digital information, managing and retrieving knowledge efficiently has become a major challenge. Traditional systems rely on keyword-based search which lacks context understanding.

This project presents Gyan Vault, an AI-powered knowledge management system using FastAPI, React, FAISS, and Large Language Models. It enables semantic search, intelligent document understanding, and context-aware response generation.
---
CHAPTER 2
2.1 SYSTEM STUDY
Traditional systems fail in handling unstructured data and context-aware retrieval. Gyan Vault solves this using vector embeddings, hybrid search (FAISS + BM25), and LLMs.
2.2 FEASIBILITY STUDY

2.2 FEASIBILITY STUDY
Technical: Uses modern scalable tools like FastAPI, React, LangChain.
Economic: Open-source and low-cost.
Operational: Simple UI, easy to use.
2.3 TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES
Backend: FastAPI, Uvicorn, SQLAlchemy
AI: Sentence Transformers, FAISS, LangChain, Gemini/Ollama
Frontend: React, Tailwind, Three.js
---
CHAPTER 3
3.1 PROBLEM IDENTIFICATION

- Poor keyword search
- No context understanding
- Difficult document processing
3.2 IMPLEMENTATION
- Upload documents
- Convert to embeddings
- Store in FAISS
- Query → retrieve → LLM response
---
CHAPTER 4
METHODOLOGY
- Data ingestion
- Text chunking
- Embedding generation
- Hybrid retrieval
- Response generation
---
CHAPTER 5
RESULTS
- Accurate semantic search

- Fast responses
- Better UX
---
CHAPTER 6
CONCLUSION
Gyan Vault provides an intelligent, scalable solution for knowledge retrieval.
FUTURE SCOPE
- Mobile app
- Voice input
- Cloud integration
